mission.title: rook: Air-Gapped/Offline installation require much effort currently
mission.description: Air-Gapped/Offline installation require much effort currently. Requested by 8+ users.

steps.title: Check current rook deployment
steps.description:
Verify your rook version and configuration:
```bash
kubectl get pods -n rook -l app.kubernetes.io/name=rook
helm list -n rook 2>/dev/null || echo "Not installed via Helm"
```
This feature requires a working rook installation.

steps.title: Review rook configuration
steps.description:
Inspect the relevant rook configuration:
```bash
kubectl get all -n rook -l app.kubernetes.io/name=rook
kubectl get configmap -n rook -l app.kubernetes.io/part-of=rook
```
# Feature Request
I'm currently confronted with a project, where we dont have a network connection to the outer world.
Therefore we need to do a Air-Gapped (offline) installation of rook-ceph.

steps.title: Apply the fix for Air-Gapped/Offline installation require much effort…
steps.description:
create file tests/scripts/rook-ceph-image.txt which
will have list of images required for offline installation.
Commit titles and messages follow guidelines in the [developer guide](https://rook.io/docs/rook/master/development-flow.html#commit-structure).
```yaml
$ kubectl get pods -n rook-ceph -o jsonpath="{..image}" |tr -s '[[:space:]]' '\n' |sort |uniq -c
    106 ceph/ceph:v14.2.9
     48 quay.io/cephcsi/cephcsi:v2.1.2
      8 quay.io/k8scsi/csi-attacher:v2.1.0
     16 quay.io/k8scsi/csi-node-driver-registrar:v1.2.0
      8 quay.io/k8scsi/csi-provisioner:v1.4.0
      8 quay.io/k8scsi/csi-resizer:v0.4.0
      4 quay.io/k8scsi/csi-snapshotter:v1.2.2
     20 rook/ceph:v1.3.11
```

steps.title: Verify the feature works
steps.description:
Test that the new capability is working as expected:
```bash
kubectl get pods -n rook -l app.kubernetes.io/name=rook
kubectl get events -n rook --sort-by='.lastTimestamp' | tail -10
```
Confirm the feature described in "Air-Gapped/Offline installation require much effort…" is functioning correctly.

resolution.summary:
create file tests/scripts/rook-ceph-image.txt which
will have list of images required for offline installation.
Commit titles and messages follow guidelines in the [developer guide](https://rook.io/docs/rook/master/development-flow.html#commit-structure).
codeSnippets:
$ kubectl get pods -n rook-ceph -o jsonpath="{..image}" |tr -s '[[:space:]]' '\n' |sort |uniq -c
    106 ceph/ceph:v14.2.9
     48 quay.io/cephcsi/cephcsi:v2.1.2
      8 quay.io/k8scsi/csi-attacher:v2.1.0
     16 quay.io/k8scsi/csi-node-driver-registrar:v1.2.0
      8 quay.io/k8scsi/csi-provisioner:v1.4.0
      8 quay.io/k8scsi/csi-resizer:v0.4.0
      4 quay.io/k8scsi/csi-snapshotter:v1.2.2
     20 rook/ceph:v1.3.11

$ awk '/image:/ {print $2}' cluster/examples/kubernetes/ceph/operator.yaml cluster/examples/kubernetes/ceph/cluster.yaml | tee -a rook-ceph-image.txt && awk '/quay.io/ || /k8s.gcr.io/ {print $3}' cluster/examples/kubernetes/ceph/operator.yaml | tr -d '"' | tee -a rook-ceph-image.txt                                                          
rook/ceph:master
ceph/ceph:v15.2.4
quay.io/cephcsi/cephcsi:v3.1.1
k8s.gcr.io/sig-storage/csi-node-driver-registrar:v2.0.1
k8s.gcr.io/sig-storage/csi-resizer:v1.0.0
k8s.gcr.io/sig-storage/csi-provisioner:v2.0.0
k8s.gcr.io/sig-storage/csi-snapshotter:v3.0

That renders the complete yamls and shows the images used.. 
For offline usage - I then override each of these image values with my own (in my values file) - and point them to my local Helm repo in artifactory. That works great.
> 我所做的 - 只是使用`helm template rook/rook --values myvalues.yaml | grep image`
> 它呈现完整的 yaml 并显示使用的图像..
> 对于离线使用 - 然后我用我自己的（在我的值文件中）覆盖这些图像值中的每一个 - 并将它们指向我的本地 Helm 存储库在人工制品。这很好用。

but helm just install rook operator, not install ceph cluster
in china , we can't pull k8s.gcr.io , for chinese install rook More difficult!

prerequisites.description: A running Kubernetes cluster with rook installed or the issue environment reproducible.
